description_long: This rifle features a robust, olive-green body with a cylindrical barrel and a slightly angular muzzle. The main body is accented with black and red components, including a prominent black mounting bracket with visible bolts and two red switches or levers on the top and side. The rear section is hexagonal and houses a black circular cap, likely for maintenance or battery access, and a black pistol grip beneath. The top of the rifle includes a small metallic ring, possibly for mounting or sighting purposes. The overall design suggests a modern, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments, with a utilitarian finish and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern olive-green rifle with black and red accents, featuring a cylindrical barrel, angular muzzle, and tactical mounting bracket.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, mounting bracket, red switches, and pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the angular muzzle and concentric barrel opening.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the mounting bracket and switches, with grip and cap visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the hexagonal rear cap and the alignment of the barrel.
